llm_result.summary: The presenting pattern shows memory-doubt about locking (C01) with compulsive door-checking (C02), urge resistance difficulty (C03), time cost/lateness (C04), social embarrassment (C05), and self-criticism (C06). Modifiable levers span: (BIO) environmental cues and sleep-environment optimization; (PSYCHO) cognitive-metacognitive training, exposure/response prevention, implementation intentions, self-compassion; and (SOCIAL) accountability and feedback systems. Suggested interventions aim to externalize feedback, decrease reinforcement of checking, improve memory confidence, and reduce the social and time costs of the behavior, while tracking changes with simple, scalable measurements. Time horizons range from 4 to 12 weeks with varying feasibility and expected impact, prioritizing high-impact, low-risk, easily scalable options first. If acute risk emerges, seek professional help promptly (not observed in this case).

solutions.solution_candidate: Brief metacognitive training to calibrate memory confidence and promote acceptance of internal doubt; includes structured prompts for reality-testing and a weekly reflection on locking events to separate memory certainty from action.
solutions.mechanism_rationale: Enhances confidence in memory accuracy without requiring constant rechecking, reduces urge-driven checking, and mitigates self-criticism by reframing doubt as a normal cognitive signal.
solutions.measurement: Post-event memory confidence ratings (0-100); number of checks per leaving episode; self-rated acceptance of lock evidence (0-10).
solutions.safety_notes: Minimal risk; monitor for frustration if training items are not matched by behavior.
solutions.mapping_query: Target C01 with metacognitive calibration to improve acceptance of memory and reduce C03/C06.

solutions.solution_candidate: Structured exposure and response prevention: deliberately delay checking after locking, starting with a brief (e.g., 2-minute) delay and gradually increasing; during delay, maintain a non-check response (e.g., grounding breath).
solutions.mechanism_rationale: Breaks the reinforcement cycle of checking; builds tolerance to doubt and reduces lateness by decreasing unnecessary checks.
solutions.measurement: Frequency of checks per leaving; time to depart; urge intensity ratings during delay (0-10).
solutions.safety_notes: Monitor distress; adapt pace to individual tolerance; if panic occurs, pause ERP and resume with clinician guidance.
solutions.mapping_query: ERP-based disruption of the checking loop addressing C02 and C03.

solutions.solution_candidate: Two-step leaving rule: after locking, commit to a fixed exit plan (e.g., leave within a defined time window and perform a brief 60-second grounding if doubt arises) to prevent incremental checks.
solutions.mechanism_rationale: Creates automatic, pre-decided action in the face of doubt, reducing delayed departure and stopping recurrent checking.
solutions.measurement: On-time departure rate; number of checks per leaving episode; urge strength during doubt (0-10).
solutions.safety_notes: None beyond standard cognitive-behavioral pacing; ensure rules are clear and feasible.
solutions.mapping_query: Link cue-doubt to exit behavior via concrete implementation intentions.

solutions.solution_candidate: Environmental cueing: install a real-time locked/unlocked indicator on the door plus optional auto-lock after a short delay; include a subtle audible cue when the door locks.
solutions.mechanism_rationale: External, reliable feedback reduces reliance on internal memory sense of 'did I lock it?' and decreases repetitive checking.
solutions.measurement: Frequency of checks per leaving; perceived trust in indicator (0-10); lateness changes.
solutions.safety_notes: Respect privacy and avoid false alarms; ensure device reliability to prevent distrust.
solutions.mapping_query: BIO environmental cueing to reduce memory doubt and checking.

solutions.solution_candidate: Brief training in self-compassion and nonjudgmental self-talk after episodes; replace harsh self-criticism with soothing, supportive inner dialogue to reduce embarrassment and negative self-evaluation.
solutions.mechanism_rationale: Lowering self-criticism reduces mood-related triggers for re-checking and decreases social discomfort after delays.
solutions.measurement: Self-criticism scale scores; post-episode embarrassment rating; mood rating.
solutions.mapping_query: Address C05/C06 via compassionate self-relating strategies.

solutions.solution_candidate: Engage a trusted accountability partner to confirm lock status after leaving; share a simple daily log; partner support reduces secrecy and social discomfort.
solutions.mechanism_rationale: Social accountability lowers avoidance, supports timely departure, and buffers self-criticism by adding external validation.
solutions.measurement: Number of logs shared; partner confirmations; lateness frequency; self-rated embarrassment.
solutions.safety_notes: Maintain privacy boundaries; partner should provide supportive, non-judgmental feedback.
solutions.mapping_query: Leverage social support to mitigate embarrassment and timing costs.

solutions.solution_candidate: A simple logging app to track departures, number of checks, mood, and confidence; provide weekly feedback dashboards and optional clinician review.
solutions.mechanism_rationale: Objective data increases awareness, supports cognitive strategies, and enables data-guided adjustments; promotes cross-domain engagement.
solutions.measurement: Daily entries; weekly dashboards; changes in C02 events; punctuality; mood and confidence trends.
solutions.safety_notes: Ensure data privacy; secure storage; user-friendly interface; optional clinician monitoring.
solutions.mapping_query: Measurement-based care to optimize across BIO/PSYCHO/SOCIAL targets.

solutions.solution_candidate: Stabilize sleep schedule and optimize sleep quality to support executive control over compulsive urges and cognitive confidence.
solutions.mechanism_rationale: Better sleep enhances prefrontal control, reducing impulsive checking and improving memory confidence.
solutions.measurement: Sleep duration; sleep efficiency; next-day urge strength; leaving punctuality.
solutions.safety_notes: Monitor for sleep disorders; refer if needed.
solutions.mapping_query: Sleep optimization to bolster inhibitory control over checking.
